model.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
model.description: Google • Preview Gemini model tuned for high-end multimodal reasoning and long-context analysis.

pick.rationale: In this blockbuster Elite Eight matchup, the top-seeded Florida Gators clash with the second-seeded Houston Cougars in a battle between two top-five teams nationally. Both squads boast incredibly balanced profiles, with Florida ranking fourth in KenPom and Houston right behind them at fifth. The game projects as a grueling, physical contest, pitting Houston's suffocating fourth-ranked defense against Florida's elite top-10 units on both ends of the floor. While the Cougars are battle-tested and excel at controlling the tempo, the Gators' marginally superior offensive execution and slightly higher adjusted efficiency margin give them the narrow edge needed to outlast Houston and advance to the Final Four.

reasoningStep.title: Florida vs. Houston: Elite Eight Clash of Titans
reasoningStep.summary: Florida and Houston enter this matchup as the #4 and #5 teams in the country, respectively. Both teams feature elite, balanced profiles with top-10 units on both ends of the floor.
evidence: Florida ranks 4th in KenPom with a 33.83 AdjEM, featuring the 9th-ranked offense and 5th-ranked defense.
Houston ranks 5th in KenPom with a 33.55 AdjEM, featuring the 16th-ranked offense and 4th-ranked defense.
Florida's slight edge in offensive efficiency gives them the nod in a tightly contested game.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: demo-2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: e8-south-1
Current game label: South Regional Final
Round: Elite 8
Resolved teams: Florida (florida) vs Houston (houston)
Prior committed picks: 62
